summary: Iter31 routing + dashboard testing complete. Backend regression 30/30 PASS. Frontend Operate landing + 6-section breakdown render correctly with all 30+ data-testids present. /dashboard/demo Bloomberg command center renders with all hero metrics, opp/warn split, pipeline (3 rows), 6 AI signals, heartbeat dot, quick actions. Nav active states + dark/light theme switching verified across /operate (parchment), /dashboard/demo (dark), /invest (dark). Legacy /dashboard/asset/demo still renders the old Dashboard.jsx. Landing CTAs (landing-cta-operate + landing-engine-operate-cta) correctly route to /operate. ONE CRITICAL bug found: the two CTAs at the bottom of Operate's Final Action Plan navigate to non-existent routes.

ui_bugs.issue: operate-cta-upgrade-cart navigates to '/upgrade-cart/demo/0' and operate-cta-rewrite navigates to '/listing-rewrite/demo/0' — BOTH routes are NOT defined in App.js. Console emits: "No routes matched location '/upgrade-cart/demo/0'" and same for listing-rewrite. Result: clicking either CTA renders an empty <main> (only 227 chars of body text — just the Nav + Footer). The actual routes defined in App.js are '/upgrade/demo/:upgradeIdx' and '/listing/demo/:upgradeIdx'. Fix: change line 526 of /app/frontend/src/pages/Operate.jsx from navigate('/upgrade-cart/demo/0') -> navigate('/upgrade/demo/0'), and line 540 from navigate('/listing-rewrite/demo/0') -> navigate('/listing/demo/0').

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Operate.jsx CTA routes — change '/upgrade-cart/demo/0' to '/upgrade/demo/0' and '/listing-rewrite/demo/0' to '/listing/demo/0' (or alternatively add new route aliases in App.js). Currently both CTAs lead to a blank page.
critical_code_review_comments: Operate.jsx lines 526 & 540 use route paths ('/upgrade-cart/demo/0', '/listing-rewrite/demo/0') that do not exist in App.js — root cause appears to be that the iter31 spec listed those as desired URLs but the actual App.js routes were never renamed from '/upgrade/demo/...' / '/listing/demo/...'. Either rename the routes in App.js to match the spec OR fix the navigate() calls.

DashboardHome.jsx pipeline test-id derivation 'name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "-")' produces 'lisbon-pr-ncipe-real' for 'Lisbon Príncipe Real' (Unicode 'í' is stripped). Spec listed 'pipeline-row-paros-cliff-maison' as example so this is acceptable, but worth noting if exact strings are tested.
seed_data_creation: None — demo uses static client-side constants.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter31 backend regression: 30/30 pass (test_iter25_invest.py + test_iter24_stripe_warmup.py + test_iter30_drafts_sync.py). All Iter31 frontend testids verified present and correct: operate-kicker/headline/subtitle/url-input/analyze-btn/helper/demo-btn, all 6 operate sections (snapshot/revenue/listing/redesign/yield/action) with all sub-metrics, dashboard-home with hero-metrics (€1.42M / 9.8% / 3 / +18.4%), best-opp/underperforming/pipeline/signals(6)/heartbeat/quick-actions(4), nav active states + dark theme on /dashboard/demo and /invest. Legacy /dashboard/asset/demo still works. ONLY remaining issue: Operate's two final-action CTAs route to undefined paths — main agent should change navigate('/upgrade-cart/demo/0') -> '/upgrade/demo/0' and navigate('/listing-rewrite/demo/0') -> '/listing/demo/0' in /app/frontend/src/pages/Operate.jsx (lines 526 and 540).
rca of the issue: Operate.jsx Final Action Plan CTAs hardcode navigate('/upgrade-cart/demo/0') and navigate('/listing-rewrite/demo/0'). These routes are NOT registered in App.js — only '/upgrade/demo/:upgradeIdx' and '/listing/demo/:upgradeIdx' exist. Reproduction: open /operate -> click operate-demo-btn -> scroll to Final Action Plan -> click 'Generate Upgrade Cart' or 'Rewrite Listing'. URL changes but body is empty (Nav+Footer only, 227 chars text). Console warning: 'No routes matched location'. Mitigation: either change the navigate() targets OR add matching routes in App.js.
